char_dialogue: How'd you get here so fast?
If you want to pay me back for that gate you broke, go get rid of that... slime thing over there.
The candy cane and the shield are just... really heavy for one person to hold both.
But since you have two people, you could probably work together to block and attack together!
Oh, and you can press [ F ] to drop the item you're currently holding so your partner can pick them up.
Just remember to like... aim where you block or attack.
